title: veiled-market Marketplaces
description: Registry of skill/plugin marketplace sources queried by the discovery workflow.

sources.description: Ordered list of marketplace/git sources to scan during discovery.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this source. Used as the key in registry.json and as the 'source/{id}' GitHub label.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in issue bodies and logs.

type.description: Source type. 'marketplace' = GitHub-hosted plugin repo with a manifest (e.g. github/awesome-copilot). 'git' = plain git repo without a plugin manifest. 'api' = source exposed via a REST/GraphQL API. 'web' = source scraped from a web page.

repo.description: GitHub 'owner/repo' path. Required for Trees API scanning. Must be set for any source whose resources should be discovered.

url.description: Canonical homepage or landing-page URL for the source.

search_url.description: URL used for browsing or searching (may differ from repo URL). Informational only; discovery uses the Trees API via 'repo'.

description.description: Short human-readable description of what this source provides.

install_cmd.description: Optional. Command template for installing plugins from this source. Use '{name}' as the plugin-name placeholder.

resources.description: Resource types this source exposes. When 'plugins' is included, each plugin.json is also unwrapped and its component agents/skills/hooks/mcp/commands/instructions are emitted as separate discovery items.
